data.body: All 8 child tickets implemented and closed (substrate 8fbd -> exemplar 16a1 -> sweeps 8d01/d360/fd72/ceaa/0569 -> close-out 0ec1), each with a passing plan-review attestation + signed completion-verifier verdict, on branch feat/consistent-error-handling-ring-gun-jot. Outcome: ONE observable, lint-enforced error-handling convention across library/CLI/MCP. ruff BLE001 enabled tree-wide with an EMPTY allowlist (a new unguarded blind-except fails CI everywhere); T201 enabled with scoped per-file-ignores only for the documented permanent legitimate-print surfaces. Logging substrate (named loggers + NullHandler + stderr handlers at all 3 entrypoints) + stdout-purity contract test. ~100 unguarded broad-excepts remediated to the observability floor; 47 pre-seeded noqas re-validated. Convention documented in CLAUDE.md + src/rebar/_logging.py. Epic AC4 satisfied NON-vacuously: two opportunistic narrowings unmasked/prevented hidden bugs (_json_or TypeError; grounding-worker interrupt propagation), each with a regression test. make lint + full suite (3215 passed) green; HEAD-stable serialized runs. Discovered work: bug worm-folly-barge (stale-attestation claim friction) filed under the drift epic 4fcd.
